blocks_root_shape_check.name: blocks_root_shape_check
blocks_root_shape_check.value:
(
      "blocks"."kind" = 'daily'
      AND "blocks"."parent_block_id" IS NULL
      AND "blocks"."daily_block_id" = "blocks"."id"
    ) OR (
      "blocks"."kind" <> 'daily'
      AND "blocks"."parent_block_id" IS NOT NULL
    )
